texto: A child said What is the grass? fetching it to me with full hands
autor: How could I answer the child? I do not know what it is any morethan he.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de How could I answer the child? I do not know what it is any morethan he. que provoca temas ligados a familia. Ao questionar “A child said What is the grass? fetching it to me with full hands”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, walt-whitman, song-of-myself, com foco em song-of-myself.
